_description: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash (gemini-2.5-flash-preview-05-20). Fast and cost-effective with 1M context and thinking mode. Best for high-throughput agentic tasks where speed and cost matter. Strong tool calling with very low latency.

tool_calling._comment: Gemini 2.5 Flash supports function calling with parallel tool use. Very fast response times.

thinking._comment: Flash has thinking mode but with lower budget for speed. Increase for harder tasks.

dynamic_temperature._comment: Google recommends temperature=1.0 for most use cases.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response.
tool_call_batching._comment: Flash supports parallel function calls with very low latency.

pricing._comment: As of 2025. Extremely cost-effective. Free tier available.

rate_limits._comment: Very high throughput. Designed for high-volume use cases.

running_config.description: Google AI Studio or Vertex AI. Requires GOOGLE_API_KEY or GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS.
